Simple as typing

Three steps to never forget again

No apps to download. No account to create. Just open Telegram and go.

01
🔍

Find @ping_bot on Telegram

Search for PingBot in Telegram and hit Start. Takes 10 seconds. No signup, no email, no friction.

02
✍️

Type your reminder naturally

"Pay rent March 31 at 2:45pm" or "Call mom every Sunday at 11am" — PingBot parses it instantly.

03
🔔

Get pinged. Mark it done. Earn XP.

When the time comes, PingBot sends your reminder with a ✅ Done button. Hit it and watch your streak grow.

Built different

Everything you need to stay on track

PingBot isn't just a reminder app — it's a productivity system that rewards consistency.

🗣️

Natural Language Parsing

Just describe when you want to be reminded. "Tomorrow at 3pm", "next Monday at 9am", "in 3 days at noon" — PingBot understands it all without rigid formats.

🌍

15-City Timezone Support

Set your city once and every reminder fires at the right local time — whether you're in New York, Tokyo, Dubai, or Sydney.

🔁

Recurring Reminders

Daily habits, weekly check-ins, monthly bills — set it once with "every Friday at 10am" and PingBot handles the rest indefinitely.

⚡

XP & Level System

Earn XP every time you complete a task. Level up from 🌱 Seedling to 👑 Legend. Pro members earn 1.5× XP on every completion.

🧊

Streak Freeze (Pro)

Rest days happen. Streak Freeze tokens let Pro members protect their hard-earned streaks without completing a task — 2 tokens refresh every billing period.

Pro Feature
See it in action

Feels like texting a very organized friend

Just describe what you need. PingBot confirms the details, sends your reminder on time, and makes it satisfying to check things off.

Try it yourself →
🔔
PingBot
● online
/add
📝 What should I remind you about?

Examples:
• Call John tomorrow at 3pm
• Meeting every Friday at 10am
Pay rent March 31 at 2:45pm
📝 Task: Pay rent
📅 Date: March 31 (in 30 days)
⏰ Time: 14:45
🔄 Type: ☑️ One-time

Correct?
✅ Added!

📝 Pay rent
⏰ 14:45 on March 31
🔔 Reminder

Pay rent
Your time: 14:45
✅ Done! +10 XP
🔥 Streak: 7 days!

Quick start guide

Everything you can do with PingBot

Open Telegram, find @ping_bot, and you're ready. Here's every command you'll ever need.

📋 Managing Tasks
/add Add a new reminder in plain English
"Call John tomorrow at 3pm"
"Pay rent March 31 at 2:45pm"
"Team standup every Monday at 9am"
/list View all your active reminders
Shows time, date, and recurring status
/delete Remove a reminder with one tap
Tap the task name from the list to delete
⚡ Progress & Stats
/stats Your XP, level, streak, and best streak
Shows level name, XP to next level
/badges See earned and locked achievements
Early Bird · Week Warrior · Century · Night Owl
🌍 Settings
/timezone Set your city for accurate local times
New York · Tokyo · Dubai · Sydney · London
/start Show the welcome menu and all commands
Your current time and timezone are shown
💎 Pro Only
/upgrade Subscribe to Pro for $8/mo
Secure Stripe checkout — cancel anytime
/freeze Use a freeze token to protect your streak
2 tokens per billing period, refreshes monthly
/cancel_pro Cancel your subscription anytime
Access continues until end of billing period
💬 Natural language cheatsheet — just type these after /add
"tomorrow at 3pm"
"every Friday at 10am"
"March 31 at 2:45pm"
"next Monday at 9am"
"in 3 days at noon"
"every day at 8am"
"next week at 6pm"
"tonight at 11pm"
"every Sunday at 7am"
Stay motivated

Streaks and XP that make habits stick

Most reminders apps just ping you. PingBot makes completing tasks feel like leveling up in a game — because it is.

🔥

Daily Streaks

Consecutive days with completed tasks build your streak. Miss a day and it resets — unless you're Pro.

⚡

XP Scaling Bonus

The longer your streak, the more XP per task. Day 7 gives +5 bonus XP on top of base — rewards compound.

🏅

8 Unlockable Badges

Early Bird, Week Warrior, Night Owl, Century Club and more. Each badge marks a real achievement.

Got questions?

Frequently asked questions

PingBot is a Telegram reminder bot that uses natural language to schedule reminders. Type "Call John tomorrow at 3pm" and PingBot parses it, stores it, and sends you a reminder at the right time in your timezone — with a Done button to track completion and earn XP.
PingBot understands: "tomorrow at 3pm", "March 31 at 2:45pm", "next Monday at 9am", "every Friday at 10am", "in 3 days at noon", "daily at 8am", and many more natural combinations.
Yes — PingBot is completely free with unlimited reminders, timezone support, recurring tasks, XP, streaks, and all 8 badges. Pro unlocks 1.5× XP, streak freeze tokens, and AI goal breakdown for /month.
A Streak Freeze token lets you protect your daily streak on a rest day without completing a task. Pro members receive 2 tokens per billing period. Use /freeze in the bot to activate one.
Every completed task earns 10 base XP plus a streak bonus (+5 XP per streak day, stacking). Pro members earn 1.5× on all XP. You level up through 7 tiers from 🌱 Seedling to 👑 Legend.
Absolutely. Use /cancel_pro in the bot at any time. Your Pro access continues until the end of your current billing period — no partial charges, no hassle.

Stop forgetting. Start streaking.

Join thousands of people who use PingBot to stay on top of their tasks — every single day.
